name: Vectorman
description: Sega's late Mega Drive run-and-gun action series starring a modular robot in a post-human future. Known for pre-rendered 3D-style visuals and technical showcase value on the 16-bit hardware.

eras.title: Mega Drive Era
eras.description: The original 16-bit entries, positioned as late-generation technical showcases for the Mega Drive/Genesis.
